title: The Direct Tax Vivad se Vishwas Act, 2020
full_text: The Direct Tax Vivad se Vishwas Act, 2020 प्रत्यक्ष कर विवाद से विश्वास अधिनियम, 2020 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 202003 Act Number: 03 Enactment Date: 2020-03-17 Act Year: 2020 Short Title: The Direct Tax Vivad se Vishwas Act, 2020 Hindi Title: प्रत्यक्ष कर विवाद से विश्वास अधिनियम, 2020 Long Title: An Act to provide for resolution of disputed tax and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Short title Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Amount payable by declarant. Section 4. Filing of declaration and particulars to be furnished Section 5. Time and manner of payment. Section 6. Power to remove difficulties Section 12. Power to make rules.
